escalation.rationale: Israel-Iran tensions spike as Netanyahu pushes for renewed military action against Trump's diplomatic efforts while Iran warns of wider conflict expansion.

ticker_items: Iran reviewing US peace proposal as Trump awaits 'right answers'
Netanyahu 'beside himself with rage' after Trump call on Iran
Eight killed in Israeli air attacks on southern Lebanon
Ukrainian drone strike kills two in Russia's Samara region
China-Russia summit deepens strategic partnership amid Western tensions

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drone strike killed two people in southwestern Russia

middle_east.description: Israeli air attacks killed at least eight people in southern Lebanon
Hezbollah drone explosion wounded four Israeli soldiers, one seriously

claimed_totals.figure: 3,468 dead in Iran, 3,042 dead in Lebanon, 28 killed in Gulf states

middle_east.text: If we don't get the right answers, it goes very quickly. We're all ready to go
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Any new U.S. military strike on the country would expand the war beyond the Middle East
middle_east.speaker: IRGC
middle_east.title: Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps

observers.description: Xi Jinping hosted Putin in Beijing for two-day summit marking 25th anniversary of cooperation treaty. Bilateral trade exceeded $240 billion in 2025 as China deepens strategic partnership with Russia.
Norway seeks to lead a 'Viking Bloc' of northern European nations to contain Russia. The initiative aims to coordinate regional defense efforts among well-positioned Nordic and Baltic states.
Pakistan deployed 8,000 troops, fighter jet squadron, and Chinese-made air defense system to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. Deployments began in early April according to Reuters report.

financial.notes: Iran imposing fees on subsea internet cables in Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing blockade tensions.

update_log.text: Iran reviewing latest US peace proposal as Trump awaits Tehran's response
Israeli air attacks kill at least eight in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
Ukrainian drone strike kills two civilians in Russia's Samara region
Netanyahu reportedly furious after tense phone call with Trump over Iran strategy
